archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with Indian Creator vibe

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, prioritize generous spacing (p-6, p-8)
layout.container: mobile-first centered layout on desktop: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative shadow-2xl bg-[#F9F9F8] overflow-hidden

components.buttons: pill-shaped (rounded-full), bold text, generous padding (px-6 py-3), solid colors with hover state
components.cards: rounded-3xl bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] p-5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E5E5E5] px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center z-50
components.inputs: rounded-2xl border border-[#E5E5E5] bg-[#F9F9F8] px-4 py-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A0A0A] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all w-full
components.tab_item: px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-bold transition-colors cursor-pointer

animations.stagger_list: use framer-motion for staggered entrance of list items

instructions_to_main_agent.framework: Use React with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI (for complex components like forms, tabs, dialogs).
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Use a mock router or state to handle the 20 distinct screens transitions if purely frontend.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for premium duotone/bold icons.
instructions_to_main_agent.desktop_wrapper:
Wrap the main app in `
[APP CONTENT]
` for a premium mobile frame.
instructions_to_main_agent.no_purple: CRITICAL: Do not use any generic purple, violet, or teal. Stick strictly to the defined Terracotta (#E25238) and Obsidian Black (#0A0A0A) palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.brand_differentiation: Visually distinguish Brand mode vs Creator mode. e.g. Creator dashboard uses bright off-white bg, Brand dashboard uses dark theme (#0A0A0A) or vice versa to clearly indicate the current mode.
